svg.text: Thank you for dining with us!
Shows individual tax lines on receipt
Prints blank tip line for cash payments
Requires customer email/phone on file to enable
Thank you for dining with us!
Send email receipt after card payment
Triggers on pos_payments INSERT where method=card
Send SMS receipt after card payment
Send email for cash payments (if on file)
Only if customer email exists in pos_customers
OFF — customers always offered paper receipt
When ON — paper only if customer requests
Reduce paper waste. Customer can request paper at any time.
Email via SendGrid / SMS via Twilio Programmable SMS
QR code on receipt → same URL (no app needed)
Stored in pos_receipts, linked to pos_payments
Schema: pos_receipts(id, payment_id, method, sent_at, pdf_url)
All fields sourced from pos_config table — no hardcodes
